title: fix: restore missing header row in APPS.md
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Table manners
gist.blurb: We accidentally knocked the top shelf off our apps showcase table. It's been glued back together and is looking sharp again.
gist.summary: Restored the missing table header and separator rows in the APPS.md showcase file.
gist.impact: The community apps list is properly formatted and readable again.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot (Polly) fixing a broken wooden table or shelf, maybe holding a hammer or some glue. Nomnom creature eating the old broken pieces. Cozy pixel art style.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny tool belt, fixing a broken wooden table with a hammer. The round tan nomnom creature happily eats the broken wood splinters nearby. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny tool belt, fixing a broken wooden table with a hammer. The round tan nomnom creature happily eats the broken wood splinters nearby. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background.
